allow: Bash(gh api repos/TomWesley/WesleyArcadeSite/actions/runs --jq '.workflow_runs[:3] | .[] | {id: .id, status: .status, conclusion: .conclusion, created_at: .created_at, event: .event}' 2>&1)
Bash(git -C /Users/tomwesley/LocalGithubFiles/WesleyArcadeSite fetch origin && git -C /Users/tomwesley/LocalGithubFiles/WesleyArcadeSite log --oneline origin/main -5)
Bash(which convert && convert --version 2>&1 | head -2; which magick && magick --version 2>&1 | head -2; which sips 2>&1)

Bash(cd /Users/tomwesley/LocalGithubFiles/ReflectionsPhaser/public && magick favicon.png -fuzz 20% -transparent "rgb\(155,155,155\)" -trim +repage favicon-transparent.png && magick identify favicon-transparent.png)

Bash(magick favicon.png -fuzz 25% -fill none -draw "alpha 0,0 floodfill" -draw "alpha 481,0 floodfill" -draw "alpha 0,449 floodfill" -draw "alpha 481,449 floodfill" -trim +repage favicon-transparent.png && magick identify favicon-transparent.png)

Bash(magick favicon.png -fuzz 30% -transparent "rgb\(158,158,158\)" -transparent "rgb\(150,150,150\)" -transparent "rgb\(145,145,145\)" -transparent "rgb\(160,160,160\)" -transparent "rgb\(165,165,165\)" -transparent "rgb\(170,170,170\)" -transparent "rgb\(140,140,140\)" -transparent "rgb\(135,135,135\)" -transparent "rgb\(130,130,130\)" -transparent "rgb\(175,175,175\)" -transparent "rgb\(180,180,180\)" -trim +repage favicon-transparent.png && magick identify favicon-transparent.png)
Bash(magick favicon.png \\\( +clone -fill black -colorize 100% -fill white -draw "circle 241,225 241,1" \\\) -alpha off -compose CopyOpacity -composite -trim +repage favicon-transparent.png)

Bash(magick favicon.png \\
  \\\( +clone -fill black -colorize 100% -fill white -draw "circle 241,225 241,1" \\\) \\
  -alpha off -compose CopyOpacity -composite \\
  \\\( +clone -alpha extract -negate \\\) \\
  \\\( -clone 0 -fuzz 25% -fill "rgb\(12,12,24\)" -opaque "rgb\(155,155,155\)" -opaque "rgb\(158,158,158\)" -opaque "rgb\(160,160,160\)" -opaque "rgb\(150,150,150\)" -opaque "rgb\(145,145,145\)" -opaque "rgb\(165,165,165\)" \\\) \\
  -delete 0,1 -trim +repage favicon-dark.png)

Bash(magick favicon.png \\
  \\\( +clone -fill black -colorize 100% -fill white -draw "circle 241,225 241,1" \\\) \\
  -alpha off -compose CopyOpacity -composite \\
  -write mpr:original \\
  \\\( mpr:original -colorspace HSL -channel G -separate +channel -threshold 8% -negate \\\) \\
  -compose over \\
  mpr:original \\
  \\\( -clone 1 -fill "rgb\(12,12,24\)" -opaque white \\\) \\
  \\\( -clone 0 -clone 2 -clone 1 -compose over -composite \\\) \\
  -delete 0-2 \\
  -trim +repage favicon-dark.png)

Bash(\\
magick favicon-transparent.png -resize 32x32 favicon-32.png && \\
magick favicon-transparent.png -resize 16x16 favicon-16.png && \\
magick favicon-transparent.png -resize 180x180 apple-touch-icon.png && \\
magick favicon-transparent.png -resize 192x192 favicon-192.png && \\
magick favicon-transparent.png -resize 512x512 favicon-512.png && \\
magick favicon-16.png favicon-32.png favicon.ico && \\
echo "Generated all favicon sizes" && ls -la favicon* apple-touch-icon.png)
